children.textPreview: Generated entries are render output, not authored child nodes.
This report highlights current product health for {customer.name}.
Review adoption movement against the product baseline.
Confirm risk items before export readiness review.
Next review owner: {prepared.by}{line-break}Confirm export parity before runtime bridge work.

actionLanes.label: Open
actionLanes.reason: snapshot bridge creates an editable session from canonical package input

actionLanes.label: Select
actionLanes.reason: browser-only selection synchronizes tree, canvas, inspector, and status

actionLanes.label: Bridge replace
actionLanes.reason: selected plain text blocks can be replaced through the sandbox mutation bridge

actionLanes.label: Append text
actionLanes.reason: selected plain text blocks can receive explicit text.insert actions before caret typing is wired

actionLanes.label: Apply packet
actionLanes.reason: browser runtime cache consumes packet-only mutation responses after boot

actionLanes.label: History
actionLanes.reason: bridge actions append core authoring intent history records for future undo and audit

actionLanes.label: Live layout
actionLanes.reason: accepted sandbox mutations produce core live-layout request summaries without running exact layout

actionLanes.label: Undo
actionLanes.reason: sandbox text edits can be undone through bounded in-memory inverse text patches

actionLanes.label: Redo
actionLanes.reason: sandbox text edits can be redone through bounded in-memory text patches

actionLanes.label: Type
actionLanes.reason: text transaction UI waits for a stable selection/context boundary

actionLanes.label: Insert key
actionLanes.reason: field insertion will use inline.field-ref.insert after typing selection is wired

actionLanes.label: Diagnostics
actionLanes.reason: snapshot bridge calls generation readiness without rendering artifacts

actionLanes.label: Render
actionLanes.reason: exact layout, renderer, storage, and API route are intentionally absent
